metarubrics.name: Included summary section
metarubrics.description: Did the model include SUMMARY section in its response?

metarubrics.name: Correct number of galaxies
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate redshifts of exactly {no_of_galaxies} galaxies?

metarubrics.name: Listed section measured redshifts
metarubrics.description: Did the model include REDSHIFTS OF GALAXIES USED IN THE ANALYSIS section in its response?

metarubrics.name: Redshift estimation
metarubrics.description: Did the model compute that {galaxy_ID} has redshift {z}, or value strictly inside interval [{z_min} , {z_max}]?

metarubrics.name: Fitted function - linear
metarubrics.description: Did the model state that it fitted a linear function?

metarubrics.name: Fitted function - zero offset
metarubrics.description: Did the model state that the linear function it fitted has zero offset, or claimed semantically equivalent information?

metarubrics.name: Included Hubble constant section
metarubrics.description: Did the model include HUBBLE CONSTANT section in its response?

metarubrics.name: Hubble constant estimation
metarubrics.description: Did the model compute the Hubble constant as {hubble_constant} km/s/Mpc, or value strictly inside interval [{hubble_constant_min}, {hubble_constant_max}] km/s/Mpc?

metarubrics.name: Uncertainty on Hubble constant
metarubrics.description: Did the model compute statistical uncertainty on estimation of Hubble constant as {stdev} km/s/Mpc, or value strictly inside interval [{stdev_min}, {stdev_max}] km/s/Mpc?
